features.title: Competitive Advantages
features.subtitle: Most platforms just send keyword alerts. Winly AI provides deep strategic intelligence to help you win.

aiMatching.title: V3 AI Matching Engine
aiMatching.description: Our 150-point scoring algorithm evaluates geographic feasibility, buyer openness, and historical alignment—not just keywords.

multiSource.title: Multi-Source Intelligence
multiSource.description: Seamless integration of TED (EU) and BASE (Portugal) data, giving you a complete view of the market landscape.

winProbability.title: Win Probability Calculator
winProbability.description: Don't bid blindly. See your calculated win probability (e.g., "67%") based on historical performance and buyer affinity.

competitor.title: Competitor Intelligence
competitor.description: Identify incumbents (-25 point penalty detection), analyze their pricing patterns, and spot vulnerable contracts.

pricing.title: Price Recommendations
pricing.description: Maximize margins without losing bids. Get data-driven price range suggestions based on historical awarded values.

documents.title: Automated Documents
documents.description: Save hours of manual work. We automatically fetch, organize, and eventually summarize tender documents for you.

strategic.title: Know Your Market
strategic.description: Winly AI doesn't just match keywords. We fingerprint the behavioral DNA of every buyer and competitor in the market to predict their next move.

fingerprinting.title: Behavioral Fingerprinting
fingerprinting.desc: We classify 100k+ companies into strategic clusters based on their bidding history.

discovery.title: Persona Discovery
discovery.desc: Instantly identify if a rival is a "National Dominator" or a "Local King".

prediction.title: Ghost Bidding Prediction
prediction.desc: Our engine predicts which specific competitors are likely to bid on a tender before they even submit.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your ambition. Save 17% with annual billing.

dashboard.title: Command Center
dashboard.subtitle: Proactive tender monitoring and semantic matching for your business.

biddingProfile.description: Refine services and stack to optimize engine precision.

competitors.searchPrompt: Search for a company to analyze their competitive footprint.

personas.title: Market Personas
personas.subtitle: Winly AI uses behavioral clustering to classify every buyer and competitor into specific "Personas." Understanding who you are dealing with is the first step to winning.
personas.buyersSubtitle: Classified by spending habits, openness, and price sensitivity.
personas.competitorsSubtitle: Classified by win volume, market reach, and specialization.

openInnovator.name: The Open Innovator
openInnovator.desc: Public entities that actively seek new vendors. They rarely award to the same company twice consecutively.

loyalist.name: The Loyalist
loyalist.desc: Risk-averse buyers who stick to what they know. The top winner often captures >50% of their contracts.

priceHawk.name: The Aggressive Discounter
priceHawk.desc: Budget-constrained entities that prioritize cost above all. They consistently award at massive discounts (-40% to -60%).

highValueHawk.name: The High-Value Hawk
highValueHawk.desc: Buyers of large-scale infrastructure or complex systems. They spend big but demand significant efficiency savings.

consistentStandard.name: The Consistent Standard
consistentStandard.desc: The "Bread and Butter" of the public sector. Predictable spending, standard discounts (-10%), and fair rotation.

nationalDominator.name: The National Dominator
nationalDominator.desc: Market giants with massive reach. They bid on everything, everywhere, and have the capacity to deliver at scale.

nicheSpecialist.name: The Niche Specialist
nicheSpecialist.desc: Highly technical firms that don't bid often, but when they do, they win big. Focused on specific high-value sectors.

localKing.name: The Local King
localKing.desc: Smaller firms that dominate a specific municipality. They have 100% client dependency and rarely venture outside their district.

risingStar.name: The Rising Star
risingStar.desc: Successful SMEs that are rapidly expanding their client base. They have broken out of "Local" status and are scaling up.

about.heroSubtitle: We believe that every business, regardless of size, deserves a fair shot at government contracts. Winly AI levels the playing field with enterprise-grade intelligence.
about.missionDesc1: The EU public procurement market is worth over €2 trillion annually, yet it remains opaque and difficult to navigate for many SMEs. Complex documentation, fragmented data sources, and lack of competitive visibility create high barriers to entry.
about.missionDesc2: Winly AI was founded to solve this information asymmetry. By combining data from TED (Tenders Electronic Daily) and national portals like BASE (Portugal) with advanced AI, we provide the clarity businesses need to bid with confidence.
about.transparencyDesc: Making government spending data accessible and actionable.
about.excellenceDesc: Helping high-quality suppliers win based on merit.
about.communityDesc: Building a network of trusted EU suppliers.
about.teamDesc: Our team combines deep expertise in public administration, data science, and enterprise software development.
